closureNotes.outcome: URO Tier 1 T1 foundation landed on EB main at c356d81 (PR #307). Per v1.0.4 spec (SR PR #134 e59a567): 23 scope files including ROS 2 Jazzy Dockerfile + colcon workspace with 9 luhtech_msgs .msg files (VoxelPose, ResourceStatus, VoxelGroup, VoxelGroupArray, VoxelGroupEvent, VoxelStateArray, VoxelStateEvent, EFASState, EFASAlert), foxglove_bridge launch config, /api/uro/viewer-token + /internal/uro-ws-auth API routes with tests, nginx /ws/uro/ subrequest auth config, voxel_groups Prisma migration with GIN + B-tree indexes, service-uro-sim catalog entry, uro-sim architecture entry, follow-up register addition for parent_jti binding, EB-local SPEC.md. All 4 required CI checks green; non-required Phase 2 DB Integration + E2E Staging failures triaged as not T1-caused. Parent arc d-2026-06-05-eb-tier1-ros-overlay-foundation transitions to S5-in-progress per parent spec validation.postMerge[0].
closureNotes.debt: FU-EB-URO-T1-ROUTE-MOUNTING-1 (P2, no blockers): viewerTokenRoute + uroWsAuthRoute compile + test clean but are not mounted in apps/api-gateway/src/server.ts. Live smoke tests against /api/uro/viewer-token return 404 until wiring lands. Pure wiring change; deferred to a separate small PR rather than expanding T1 scope. OUT-2 acceptance criteria 1-5 are met at unit-test level; live verification blocked by mounting gap. T1 closes with debt explicitly named per truth-delivered schema closureStatus=closed-with-debt requirement.
closureNotes.overrideRecord:
Three substrate-corrections + deferrals captured for the record:

1. FU-EB-USER-JWT-JTI-CLAIM-1 (P1, parent arc OUT-4 prereq) remains open through T1 merge. Rationale: T1 viewer-token endpoint mints with its own jti for endpoint-level tracking; parent_jti binding requires user JWTs to carry jti and is deferred to follow-on FU-EB-URO-VIEWER-TOKEN-PARENT-JTI-BINDING-1 (P2, filed during T1, blocked by JWT-JTI-CLAIM-1). This is a security hardening, not a functional blocker for the viewer demo.

2. FU-EB-URN-NAMESPACE-RECONCILE-1 (P1, parent arc OUT-4 prereq) remains open through T1 merge. Rationale: T1 creates voxel_groups table empty; no production data loaded in T1 (Maple Ridge bundle loads in T5), so production URN format (urn:ectropy:* vs canonical urn:luhtech:ectropy:*) does not affect T1. URN reconcile remains tracked for completion before T5 production data load. T1 new code uses canonical urn:luhtech:ectropy:* from day one.

3. Framework substrate-correction during execution (commit a7c6e94 within PR #307): tarball-authored route files imported from 'fastify' but api-gateway uses Express + Passport.js. EB CLI caught this at PR CI and refactored both route files in-place — pure mintViewerToken / validateViewerToken logic unchanged, Fastify wrappers replaced with Express Router + handler exports, type-augmentation import path corrected (4 levels -> 5 levels). TypeScript + tests clean post-fix. Root cause: EB-chat authored against assumed framework without verifying via eb-agent:trace-service api-gateway. Memory #25 (substrate-correction discipline) violation, self-caught at execution layer rather than authoring layer. Pattern recoverable; recording as substrate evidence for the rule-pipeline (see rulePipelineEvidence below).

P1 deferrals (items 1 + 2) are pre-agreed at parent arc OUT-4 acceptance criterion 3 — explicit follow-on captures, not gating items. The framework correction (item 3) was an in-execution recovery, not a pre-agreed deferral.
